name: BTLM-3B-8K
archDisplay: Dense transformer, GPT-2 style + SwiGLU + ALiBi + muP (32 layers, d_model 2560)
note: Bittensor Language Model: 2.6B (marketed as 3B) with 7B-class quality and 8K context, trained on 627B tokens of SlimPajama, trained on the Condor Galaxy 1 (CG-1) supercomputer (Cerebras/G42 partnership).
tpsNote: Cerebras reports the model fits in under 3GB of memory at 4-bit precision for mobile/edge deployment.
